title: Harden flywheel-local-launcher skill from dogfood lessons
description: Build the 10 dogfood lessons from the platform-monorepo de-bp run into the skill. Cheatsheet is HUMAN-facing (keep day-to-day only). Move setup/config to a dedicated references/setup.md. Review from BOTH perspectives: a new workstream on an existing flywheel repo, AND a brand-new project with no flywheel setup. Be precise + concise; remove repetition.

title: S1 create references/setup.md (consolidate install + per-machine + per-repo + new-project/symlink-consistency fix + bv tutorial + xhigh->high config + agent-mail server)
close_reason: setup.md created; flywheel-link.sh runs inits via the symlink path

title: Make beads->Linear projection portable + opt-in for ALL flywheel repos
description: Today the projector is platform-only (scripts/beads-linear-projector.ts) and DORMANT (no epic carries linear_project_id). Make it a portable, opt-in flywheel capability. DECISION FIRST (ask user): skill-asset (carry + copy into repo, like the lease guard) vs shared package vs documented-copy. Then document the relationship in setup.md: beads = source of truth; a Linear Project is a ONE-WAY generated mirror of a beads EPIC (1:1); opt-in by setting linear_project_id in the epic metadata; projector emits DETERMINISTIC linearMcp ops (saveProject/saveStatusUpdate/saveComment) applied via the Linear MCP; NEVER part of the core br/bv/Agent-Mail loop (a repo with no mapping runs the full flywheel with zero Linear). Wire opt-in for platform-monorepo + customer-template. ACCEPTANCE: projector runnable from any flywheel repo; setup.md documents opt-in wiring + determinism + decoupling; both repos can map an epic when desired.

title: S2 slim + de-dup cheatsheet.md (human day-to-day only): remove moved setup sections; fix bv = human TUI vs agent --robot; add CC-controller pane-monitoring; commit-immediately in shipping; one source for launch + no-worktrees
close_reason: cheatsheet slimmed to human day-to-day (setup→setup.md); bv human-TUI vs agent-robot fixed; CC-controller pane-monitoring + commit-immediately + one-line-spawn + clean-tree added; SKILL routes to setup.md+cheatsheet; S5 verify caught missing 'cass index' (added to setup.md §A.5). All 10 lessons mapped; no repetition.

title: S3 fix flywheel-link.sh: run br/ntm init via the projects_base symlink path (not the real nested path) so Agent Mail keys one project; default codex high; ubs --staged already done
close_reason: setup.md created; flywheel-link.sh runs inits via the symlink path

title: S4 update SKILL.md: point to setup.md; capture operational lessons (commit-immediately, auto-assign, CC-controller-monitoring, dropped-init-prompt one-line spawn, clean-tree-before-swarm)
close_reason: cheatsheet slimmed to human day-to-day (setup→setup.md); bv human-TUI vs agent-robot fixed; CC-controller pane-monitoring + commit-immediately + one-line-spawn + clean-tree added; SKILL routes to setup.md+cheatsheet; S5 verify caught missing 'cass index' (added to setup.md §A.5). All 10 lessons mapped; no repetition.

title: S5 verify both perspectives: walk a brand-new project through setup.md, and a new workstream through the cheatsheet; confirm no repetition and every lesson lands
close_reason: cheatsheet slimmed to human day-to-day (setup→setup.md); bv human-TUI vs agent-robot fixed; CC-controller pane-monitoring + commit-immediately + one-line-spawn + clean-tree added; SKILL routes to setup.md+cheatsheet; S5 verify caught missing 'cass index' (added to setup.md §A.5). All 10 lessons mapped; no repetition.

title: S6 husky-aware lease guard + preflight curl timeout (found verifying skill on customer-template)
close_reason: setup chains the portable lease guard into existing husky pre-commit instead of ntm-guards-install (which fails on husky repos); preflight curl now has --max-time 3 so it can't hang. Verified end-to-end on customer-template.

title: S7 fold swarm-launch lessons into cheatsheet
close_reason: Added to cheatsheet §3: pre-spawn codex/claude current+authed check (stale Codex self-updates and drops panes to shell); 0/N-ready recovery (respawn cod + re-send kickoff + assign); CC controller flakiness (401/login, bypass screen, and feed brief via tmux send-keys NOT ntm send which pastes as [Image]); ntm kill --force.

title: preflight: probe codex/claude auth + currency (not just installed)
description: flywheel-link.sh preflight checks tools are INSTALLED but not AUTHED/CURRENT. A stale/logged-out Codex passes preflight, then self-updates or 401s on first spawn and drops panes to the shell (hit on customer-template). Add a NON-FATAL warning: probe codex (echo ok | codex exec returns text; flag if it just updated) and claude login. Keep it a warning so it stays modular. ACCEPTANCE: preflight flags an unauthed/stale codex or claude before spawn; never hard-fails on it.

title: setup: detect + warn on a heavy pre-commit (commit-immediately crawls)
description: A repo whose pre-commit runs typecheck/build/test on EVERY commit makes commit-immediately crawl/stall (customer-template needed a bead to split fast-pre-commit / heavy-pre-push). setup should DETECT (grep .husky/pre-commit for typecheck|build|test) and WARN with the suggested split, WITHOUT forcing it — not every repo has husky; stay modular. ACCEPTANCE: setup warns when pre-commit looks heavy; forces nothing.
